auth.label: API Key
auth.description: You.com API key sent in the X-API-Key header. Create or manage keys on the You.com Platform API Keys page: https://you.com/platform/api-keys

actions.name: fetch_contents
actions.description: Fetch HTML, Markdown, or metadata for one or more webpages with You.com.

urls.description: Webpage URLs to fetch contents from.

formats.description: Content formats to return for each webpage.

crawlTimeout.description: The maximum time in seconds to wait for page content.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching webpage contents.

items.description: One webpage content result returned by You.com.
A JSON object passed through to or from You.com.

raw.description: The raw content response array returned by You.com.

outputSchema.description: The normalized webpage contents returned by You.com.

actions.name: finance_research
actions.description: Generate a cited finance-grade answer with the You.com Finance Research API.

input.description: The financial research question requiring in-depth investigation.

researchEffort.description: How much effort the Finance Research API spends on the question.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for You.com finance research.

anyOf.description: The answer content as Markdown text.
A JSON object passed through to or from You.com.

content.description: The answer content as Markdown text or a structured JSON object.

contentType.description: The format of the content field.

url.description: The URL of the source webpage.

title.description: The title of the source webpage.

snippets.description: Relevant excerpts from the source page.

raw.description: A JSON object passed through to or from You.com.

items.description: One source used to generate a research answer.

sources.description: Sources used to generate the answer.

raw.description: A JSON object passed through to or from You.com.

output.description: The research answer and its supporting sources.

raw.description: A JSON object passed through to or from You.com.

outputSchema.description: The normalized finance research response returned by You.com.

actions.name: get_account_balance
actions.description: Get the remaining You.com credit balance for the API key account.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for getting the account balance.

type.description: The billing entity type returned by You.com.

id.description: The stable hashed identifier for the billing entity.

balanceCents.description: The remaining credit balance in cents.

balanceUsd.description: The remaining credit balance converted to US dollars.

raw.description: A JSON object passed through to or from You.com.

outputSchema.description: The normalized You.com account balance response.

actions.name: research
actions.description: Generate a cited research answer with the You.com Research API.

input.description: The research question requiring in-depth investigation.

researchEffort.description: How much effort the Research API spends on the question.

includeDomains.description: Domains to restrict results to. Cannot be combined with excludeDomains.

excludeDomains.description: Domains to exclude from results. Cannot be combined with includeDomains.

boostDomains.description: Domains to boost in ranking without filtering out other domains.

freshness.description: The freshness filter, such as day, week, month, year, or YYYY-MM-DDtoYYYY-MM-DD.

country.description: The country code that determines the geographical focus of the web results.

sourceControl.description: Controls which web sources the research agent searches and visits.

outputSchema.description: A JSON object passed through to or from You.com.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for You.com research.

anyOf.description: The answer content as Markdown text.
A JSON object passed through to or from You.com.

content.description: The answer content as Markdown text or a structured JSON object.

contentType.description: The format of the content field.

url.description: The URL of the source webpage.

title.description: The title of the source webpage.

snippets.description: Relevant excerpts from the source page.

raw.description: A JSON object passed through to or from You.com.

items.description: One source used to generate a research answer.

sources.description: Sources used to generate the answer.

raw.description: A JSON object passed through to or from You.com.

output.description: The research answer and its supporting sources.

raw.description: A JSON object passed through to or from You.com.

outputSchema.description: The normalized research response returned by You.com.

actions.name: search
actions.description: Search web and news sources with the You.com Search API.

query.description: The search query used to retrieve relevant results.

count.description: The maximum number of search results to return per section.

offset.description: The pagination offset calculated in multiples of count.

country.description: The country code that determines the geographical focus of results.

language.description: The language of the web results in BCP 47 format.

livecrawl.description: The result sections to live-crawl for full page content.

livecrawlFormats.description: The formats to return when livecrawl is enabled.

includeDomains.description: Domains to restrict search results to.

excludeDomains.description: Domains to exclude from search results.

boostDomains.description: Domains to boost in search ranking.

crawlTimeout.description: The maximum time in seconds to wait for page content.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for searching You.com.

url.description: The URL of the search result.

title.description: The title or name of the search result.

description.description: A brief description of the search result.

snippets.description: Text snippets from the search result.

thumbnailUrl.description: The URL of the result thumbnail.

pageAge.description: The publication or crawl timestamp of the result.

html.description: The HTML content of the page.

markdown.description: The Markdown content of the page.

contents.description: The live-crawled page contents returned for a search result.

authors.description: The authors of the search result.

faviconUrl.description: The URL of the result domain favicon.

raw.description: A JSON object passed through to or from You.com.

items.description: One web search result returned by You.com.

url.description: The URL of the news result.

title.description: The title of the news result.

description.description: A brief description of the news result.

pageAge.description: The publication timestamp of the news result.

thumbnailUrl.description: The URL of the news thumbnail.

html.description: The HTML content of the page.

markdown.description: The Markdown content of the page.

contents.description: The live-crawled page contents returned for a search result.

raw.description: A JSON object passed through to or from You.com.

items.description: One news search result returned by You.com.

metadata.description: Metadata returned with a You.com search response.

raw.description: A JSON object passed through to or from You.com.
